title: Good Ending
description: This mod aims to improve the wilderness of Vanilla Minecraft by adding new biomes and improving vanilla biomes
body:
![Good Ending Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4e979bca147c09acdf3fad11100ea09323f6df3.png)

Good Ending is a mod that aims to improve the wilderness by adding new content such as new biomes, mechanics, mobs... etc.

It currently contains 2 new biomes (Marshy Swamp and Oak Hammock Forest) and 2 overhauled vanilla biomes (Swamp and Old growth birch forest). 

This mod was inspired by a reddit post, which was created by an individual named "Axoladdy". So go check him out and see all the cool stuff he made!

[https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/wrr73m/the_wild_update_good_ending_exploring_the_lost/](https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/wrr73m/the_wild_update_good_ending_exploring_the_lost/)

Creators: 
- Orcinus: [[Twitter]](https://twitter.com/OrcinusWasTaken), [[Discord Server]](https://discord.gg/VkSa8649)
- Ninni: [[Twitter]](https://twitter.com/Ninnih_), [[Discord Server]](https://discord.gg/gS5CnkFV)
